title: Recommendations of additional quality indicators for use in older adult residential long-term care: a RAND/UCLA Modified eDelphi Panel Method protocol
author: Curreri, Nereide
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A RAND/UCLA Modified eDelphi Panel Method will be conducted to reach a consensus among experts in long-term care (LTC) on additional quality indicators to recommend to the Swiss Federal Quality Commission.
steps_raw: A RAND/UCLA Modified eDelphi Panel Method will be conducted to reach a consensus among experts in long-term care (LTC) on additional quality indicators to recommend to the Swiss Federal Quality Commission.
keywords: Long-term care, older adults, quality, quality indicators, eDelphi method
